# link11waap_acl_profile (Resource)

Manages an ACL Profile in Link11 WAAP.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: ACL Profile Resource

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

resource "link11waap_acl_profile" "web" {
  config_id   = data.link11waap_config.main.id
  name        = "Web ACL Profile"
  description = "ACL profile for web traffic"

  # Default action when a request matches a deny rule.
  # Valid values: action-acl-block, action-waap-feed-block, action-https-redirect
  action = "action-acl-block"

  # Optional: tags for categorization
  # tags = ["web", "production"]

  # Tag identifiers to allow through
  # allow = ["trusted-networks"]

  # Tag identifiers to deny
  deny = ["acl-deny"]

  # Tag identifiers to deny (bot-specific)
  deny_bot = ["apple-crawler"]

  # Tag identifiers to allow (bot-specific)
  allow_bot = ["api"]

  # Tag identifiers to force deny (overrides allow)
  force_deny = ["enforce-acl-deny"]

  # Tag identifiers to pass through without inspection
  passthrough = ["skip-waf"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) The configuration ID.
- `name` (String) The name of the ACL profile.

### Optional

- `action` (String) Default action for the ACL profile. Allowed values: action-acl-block, action-waap-feed-block, action-https-redirect.
- `allow` (List of String) List of tag identifiers to allow.
- `allow_bot` (List of String) List of tag identifiers to allow (bot).
- `deny` (List of String) List of tag identifiers to deny.
- `deny_bot` (List of String) List of tag identifiers to deny (bot).
- `description` (String) Description of the ACL profile.
- `force_deny` (List of String) List of tag identifiers to force deny.
- `passthrough` (List of String) List of tag identifiers to pass through without inspection.
- `tags` (List of String) List of tags associated with the ACL profile.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the ACL profile.
